steps.expected: Page loads with slippage presets visible
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with slippage preset buttons visible in the action row
All five preset buttons visible in order: 3, 10, 50, 100, 300. The '3' button appears first (leftmost) in the preset group.

steps.expected: Slippage input value changes to 3 and button highlights as active
steps.observed: After clicking '3' button, it gained [active] state and the slippage input value changed from '50' to '3'
Screenshot confirms '3' button has blue filled background (active state) while other presets remain outlined

assertions.title: Slippage controls compact alongside submit button

steps.expected: Compare Quotes button is first/leftmost, followed by compact bordered slippage box with all presets on single row
steps.observed: Compare Quotes button (blue, primary) is the leftmost element. To its right is a compact bordered box containing 'SLIPPAGE' label, preset buttons (3, 10, 50, 100, 300), custom input field, and 'bps' label — all on a single row

steps.expected: Slippage controls visually smaller/subordinate to submit button
steps.observed: Slippage preset buttons are significantly smaller than the Compare Quotes button. The slippage box has a thin border and compact layout. Compare Quotes is the dominant visual element.

steps.expected: All presets still fit and are usable
steps.observed: At 375px width, the slippage row wraps below the Compare Quotes button (expected responsive behavior). All 5 presets (3, 10, 50, 100, 300) plus custom input remain visible and accessible.

steps.action: Locate custom slippage input in the compact box
steps.expected: Text input for custom bps value is visible inline
steps.observed: A textbox labeled 'Slippage (bps)' is visible inline in the compact slippage box, to the right of the preset buttons, with 'bps' suffix label

steps.expected: Input accepts the value and no preset button is highlighted
steps.observed: After setting value to '25', the input shows '25', and no preset button has active styling (all presets appear outlined/inactive)

assertions.title: Amount field on its own full-width row

steps.expected: Amount input occupies its own full-width row above from/to token fields
steps.observed: The Amount field has its own labeled row (AMOUNT label + full-width input) positioned above the Sell exact/Buy exact toggle and From Token/To Token fields. It spans the full form width.

steps.expected: Amount row is above token fields
steps.observed: DOM order confirmed: Chain → Connect Wallet → Amount → Direction toggle → From Token → To Token → Action row (Compare Quotes + Slippage)

steps.expected: Full number displays without overflow or truncation
steps.observed: The full 20-digit number '12345678901234567890' is fully visible in the amount input field with no truncation, overflow, or scrolling needed

steps.expected: All digits readable in the field
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms all 20 digits are clearly readable within the full-width amount field

steps.action: Clear localStorage and sessionStorage, reload page
steps.expected: Page loads with default tokenlist, functional form
steps.observed: After clearing storage and reloading, the page loaded with default tokens pre-populated (USDC and WETH for Base chain), all form fields functional

steps.action: Verify default tokenlist provides autocomplete tokens
steps.expected: Typing token name shows autocomplete suggestions
steps.observed: Typing 'DAI' in the From Token field showed autocomplete dropdown with 'DAI - Dai Stablecoin' and full address '0x50c5725949A6F0c72E6C4a641F24049A917DB0Cb'
All five slippage preset buttons (3, 10, 50, 100, 300) visible in the compact slippage box alongside Compare Quotes button

steps.expected: Chain selector, wallet button, amount, direction toggle, token fields, slippage, compare button all present
steps.observed: All form elements present: Chain dropdown (Base selected), Connect Wallet button, Amount input (1000), Sell exact/Buy exact toggle, From Token (USDC), To Token (WETH), Compare Quotes button, slippage presets + custom input

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. All slippage presets (including new 3 bps) are visible and functional. The compact slippage box alongside the Compare Quotes button works correctly. Amount field properly occupies its own full-width row and handles 20+ digit numbers. First-visit experience confirmed working with default tokenlist and autocomplete.
